title: Integrated PBR
description: 🌟✨This Pack Adds Integrated PBR(No Shader PBR) For The Pack VanillaXBR 🦗 By @misterk7_- 📌 It Is Still WIP But Updates Will Be Released✨🌟
body: 🌟✨This Pack Adds Integrated PBR(No Shader PBR) For Almost Every Block To The Resource Pack VanillaXBR By [misterk7_-](https://modrinth.com/user/misterk7_-)📌 Which Have Been Upscaled I Recommend You To Download [VanillaXBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillaxbr)🦗 And Put It Under This Pack(Just To Make You Feel Inside The XBR Environment With Fonts, Items But Blocks Have Been Edited) | [Youtube Showcase Ri-- (Don't Watch!)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)❌🤞🏻 Not Really Setup Yet But Ig You Can Follow : [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/technotblade)✨🌟
